comment: Variance flags raised by the underwriting pipeline. Every flag is grounded to a rule_id from usali-rules.csv and references the input documents.

flags.explanation: Broker proforma NOI of $5.20M is 19.6 percent above T-12 actual of $4.18M, exceeding 5 percent CRITICAL threshold. Reconcile by examining broker assumptions for occupancy uplift and PIP-driven ADR growth.
flags.recommended_action: Apply T-12 actual NOI as base case in underwriting; treat broker proforma as upside case only after PIP completion in Year 2.

flags.explanation: Broker proforma occupancy of 80.0 percent is 380 bps above T-12 actual of 76.2 percent. Exceeds 200 bps WARN threshold. Subject already at MPI 101.74 versus comp set so further occupancy gains require market-level demand growth.
flags.recommended_action: Cap base case occupancy at 77.5 percent (T-12 plus 130 bps) reflecting modest market growth.

flags.explanation: Broker proforma ADR of $395 is 2.6 percent above T-12 actual of $385. Within 5 percent threshold but worth noting in IC memo as PIP-driven ADR uplift assumption.
flags.recommended_action: Acceptable. Underwrite ADR uplift to $395 in Year 2 post-PIP.

flags.explanation: Insurance expense of $3,803 per key is above the non-coastal cap of $2,500 but within the coastal market range of $2,500 to $8,000. Miami Beach exposure to wind and flood loadings is consistent with this loading.
flags.recommended_action: Acceptable for Miami Beach coastal exposure. Hold quote-driven sensitivity for renewal cycle.

flags.explanation: Utilities of $5,136 per key materially exceeds the $800-$2,500 industry range. Driven by 24/7 rooftop pool, FL climate cooling load, and full F&B operation.
flags.recommended_action: Validate against energy audit report; PIP energy retrofit may yield 15-20 percent savings.

flags.explanation: GOP margin of 34.4 percent is within the 15-55 percent industry range. Lower end of urban full-service lifestyle norm of 35-42 percent reflecting elevated F&B labor and utilities.
flags.recommended_action: Identify GOP uplift levers in business plan: labor productivity, F&B mix shift to higher-margin beverage.

flags.explanation: Subject RGI of 112.2 indicates premium positioning relative to comp set, but trails Setai (130+) and 1 Hotel (125+). Yield management upside identified in market analysis (lifestyle brand premium under-realized).
flags.recommended_action: Model 200-300 bps of RGI uplift in Year 2-3 driven by post-PIP repositioning.
